description: Case style: Stainless steel square case Dial style: Black dial with black and green hands Strap style: Green rubber strap with a tang clasp for comfort and style Features: Three chronograph time displays, date aperture and branding on the 3 hour mark dial and screw to reset time Water resistance up to 50 metres, allowing you to wear it out while swimming but not poolside diving, snorkelling or water Sports Warranty: 2 years international warranty
